body.title: Reading indexer — chunk → G54 extract → FACT_CLOUD nodes
body.result: Reading indexer complete. Implements chunk→G54 extract→FACT_CLOUD deposition with chapter-aware metadata. 10 tests ✓, all 391 suite tests ✓, commit e011bfc0 pushed.
body.description:
D230. Processes blob chunks into FACT_CLOUD graph nodes.

This is a refactor + formalization of the current making_money_reader.py approach.

Steps per chunk:
1. Read chunk from blob_store (chapter_idx, chunk_idx, text)
2. G54 extract: cloud LLM extracts factual nodes from chunk
3. Deposit each node as FACT_CLOUD_{hash} with metadata: {content_id, chapter, chunk_idx, source=reading}
4. On completion: queue T-graph-integrator with content_id

Key constraint: chunk size is chapter-aware. Do not split across chapter boundaries.
Rate: configurable, default 30s between chunks (was 50s, can be faster now that it is queued not cc_send)

File: wild_igor/igor/cognition/reading_indexer.py (new, replaces making_money_reader.py)
Inertia: LOW
Size: M
Depends on: T-blob-store
